extDescription.message: Open and edit HWP/HWPX files directly in your browser. No installation, no ads, free.

optionsAutoOpen.message: Automatically open HWP/HWPX files in viewer when downloaded

optionsShowBadges.message: Show icon badge next to HWP links on web pages

optionsHoverPreview.message: Show preview when hovering over HWP links

optionsPrivacy.message: Files are never sent to any server. All processing happens locally in your browser.
